name: conversation_memory
summary: Stores, loads, and clears run-centered conversation memory for the workspace.
documentation:
Stores, loads, and clears run-centered conversation memory for the workspace.

## API Reference

### store_run_conversation
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: store_run_conversation(request: dict[str, Any]) -> dict[str, Any]

Store the current run as a conversation memory record.

### load_conversations
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: load_conversations(request: dict[str, Any], *, limit: int = 5) -> dict[str, Any]

Load recent prior run conversations and return a prompt section.

### clear_conversations
Type: function
Source: __init__.py
Signature: clear_conversations(request: dict[str, Any], *, reason: str = '') -> dict[str, Any]

Clear conversation memory from future loads while preserving an audit record.

### ConversationMemoryStore
Type: class
Source: __init__.py
Signature: class ConversationMemoryStore

Workspace storage manager for run-centered conversation memory.
